description_en: Alicante may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 26 halal restaurants and 1 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Alicante, Spain, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Alicante: 26+ halal restaurants, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
